title: Warrior (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Soldier}}
'''Warrior''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Sith warrior]]s''' of the [[Sith|Sith Order]]
*[[Sith Warrior (Moraband)|'''Sith Warriors''']] of [[Moraband]]
*'''[[Soldier|Warriors]]''', [[infantry]]man also known as "soldiers"
*'''[[Warrior caste (Geonosian)]]''', the caste of '''[[Geonosian]] warriors'''
*'''[[Chiss warrior]]s''' of the [[Chiss Ascendancy]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Clone Warrior]]s''', elite shock troops developed by [[Atha Prime/Legends|Atha Prime]]
*[[Starship/Legends|Starships]]
**[[Warrior (Star Destroyer)|'''''Warrior''''']], an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]
**[[Warrior (gunship)|'''''Warrior''''']], a [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]]; a vessel of the below manufacture line
**[[Warrior-class gunship|'''''Warrior'''''-class gunship]], a [[Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic|New Republic Defense Force]] [[New Class Modernization Program|New Class]] line of [[Assault ship/Legends|light assault]] [[Warship/Legends|warships]]
*[[Species/Legends|Species]]
**'''[[Fftssfft|Dandelion Warriors]]''', or Fftssfft, a [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]] [[Plant/Legends|botanical]] species [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]
**'''[[Lizard Warrior]]s''', a sentient [[Reptile/Legends|reptilians]] species native to Endor.
*Titles and ranks
**[[Jedi Guardian/Legends|'''Warrior Master''']], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] rank
**'''[[Sith Warrior]]''', a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] title
*Various species had '''warrior castes''' that serve as military functionaries
**[[Warrior caste (Geonosian)/Legends|'''Geonosian warrior caste''']]
**'''[[Yinchorri warrior caste]]'''
**[[Warrior caste|'''Yuuzhan Vong warrior caste''']]

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|fi=Soturi (täsmennyssivu)
}}
